title: pterocarpus korthalsianus
intro: Pterocarpus korthalsianus, also known as the Balau tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pterocarpus korthalsianus include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. Pterocarpus korthalsianus is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
